description_long: This coatrack features a robust, rectangular frame constructed from tubular metal bars, finished in a sleek black color. It consists of five evenly spaced horizontal bars supported by two vertical side posts, providing ample space for hanging coats, jackets, or other garments. Small protruding hooks are distributed along the sides of the vertical posts, designed for additional hanging capacity. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with no visible decorative elements or embellishments. The structure appears sturdy and is likely intended for wall mounting, as indicated by the side hooks and lack of a base. Its industrial aesthetic makes it suitable for urban environments such as building entrances, garages, or public spaces.
description: A sturdy, black metal coatrack with five horizontal bars and side hooks, designed for wall mounting. Its minimalist, industrial design is functional and suitable for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing five horizontal bars and all side hooks clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the coatrack, with hooks protruding slightly.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, displaying the horizontal bars and side hooks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and side hooks.
